<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>AutoForge E-commerce Demo - Multi-View Prototype</title>
    <script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com"></script>
    <style>
        /* Custom scrollbar for better aesthetics */
        ::-webkit-scrollbar {
            width: 8px;
        }
        ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {
            background: #cbd5e1;
            border-radius: 10px;
        }
        ::-webkit-scrollbar-track {
            background: #f1f5f9;
        }
        /* Utility class for tab active state */
        .tab-active {
            border-bottom-color: #3b82f6;
            color: #1e40af;
            font-weight: 600;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body class="bg-gray-50 font-sans antialiased">

    <div class="min-h-screen flex flex-col">

        <!-- Top Navigation/Header (Persistent) -->
        <header class="bg-white shadow-md sticky top-0 z-30 border-b border-gray-200">
            <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 py-3 flex justify-between items-center">
                <div class="text-2xl font-extrabold text-indigo-600 tracking-tight">
                    AutoForge <span class="text-gray-800">Demo</span>
                </div>
                
                <!-- Main Navigation Tabs -->
                <nav class="flex space-x-6 text-sm font-medium">
                    <button class="text-gray-600 hover:text-indigo-600 py-2 border-b-2 border-transparent hover:border-indigo-200 transition duration-150" onclick="showSection('product-details')">Product Details</button>
                    <button class="text-gray-600 hover:text-indigo-600 py-2 border-b-2 border-transparent hover:border-indigo-200 transition duration-150" onclick="showSection('catalog')">Catalog</button>
                    <button class="text-gray-600 hover:text-indigo-600 py-2 border-b-2 border-transparent hover:border-indigo-200 transition duration-150" onclick="showSection('cart')">Cart (3)</button>
                    <button class="text-gray-600 hover:text-indigo-600 py-2 border-b-2 border-transparent hover:border-indigo-200 transition duration-150" onclick="showSection('order-history')">Orders</button>
                    <button class="text-gray-600 hover:text-indigo-600 py-2 border-b-2 border-transparent hover:border-indigo-200 transition duration-150" onclick="showSection('admin')">Admin</button>
                </nav>

                <!-- User/Utility Actions -->
                <div class="flex items-center space-x-4">
                    <button class="text-gray-600 hover:text-indigo-600 transition duration-150">
                        <svg class="w-6 h-6" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2" d="M3 3h2l.4 2M7 13h10l4-8H5.4M7 13L5.4 5M7 13l-2.293 2.293c-.63.63-.184 1.707.707 1.707H17m0 0a2 2 0 100 4 2 2 0 000-4z"></path></svg>
                    </button>
                    <div class="flex items-center space-x-2">
                        <span class="text-sm text-gray-700 hidden sm:inline">Welcome, Jane Doe</span>
                        <img class="h-10 w-10 rounded-full object-cover border-2 border-indigo-200" src="data:image/png;base64,
